notes: New: Standard & Extra Regulation formats. Decks are checked against the official rules — Standard uses the in-rotation blocks (2-5); the April 2026 rotation moved Block 1 (OP01-OP04, ST01-ST09) to Extra only, with reprints and Manga Rares correctly staying legal. The shared ban list is enforced in both formats. The deck builder shows each deck's Standard/Extra legality under the leader, flags the exact cards making a deck illegal, and adds format / block / legality filters; Casual and Ranked grey out illegal decks so you can't queue them. New: Puzzles (Solo Play, early access) — single-board lethal puzzles with a guaranteed winning line this turn, graduated hints, a three-strike reveal, a hidden opponent hand, and some puzzles built from real recorded games. Deck builder: large match-sized hover previews with a gold glow placed away from the card you're viewing, right-click to add a full playset, hover the format chips to flag the offending cards, and collapsible filters. Custom lobbies: per-game format choice with an optional Ignore Bans toggle, a Ready button that gates the start until both players are ready, and a full match-rules summary. New: display options — pick your resolution, toggle Fullscreen / Windowed, and resize the window freely with the UI scaling to fit. Rules & card fixes: Double Attack no longer wins against a Leader with 1 Life (official ruling); Nefeltari Vivi no longer fires a phantom When-Attacking effect; Kouzuki Oden's buff and other DON!!-gated abilities now require the DON!!; and Activate: Main leader abilities work in Puzzles. Plus Advanced bot judgment improvements and bug reports that capture the full decks in play.
